convergence.reasoning: All three analysts identify the same core components: WebSocket/connection gateway, Kafka-based message queue/pub-sub, Redis cache layer, persistent distributed storage (Cassandra/ScyllaDB/CockroachDB), and an orchestration/routing layer. The confidence levels are also broadly aligned (HIGH for most, MEDIUM for storage). Minor differences exist in component naming and inclusion of Kubernetes vs. distributed ID generator, but the core architectural conclusions are the same.
